name: BossConsole

descFull: Open-source, multi-platform harness for AI agents — a native, multi-threaded operator's console (JVM, not Electron) to run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini or OpenCode with a real browser, terminal, editor, secrets & 100+ MCP tools. Built for enterprises, science & research.
